title: Spot the 10-year max_age and shorten it
prompt:
Identify the security concern in this session config and fix it:

```elixir
@session_options [
  store: :cookie,
  key: "_my_app_key",
  signing_salt: {MyApp.Salt, :get, []},
  http_only: true,
  secure: true,
  max_age: 60 * 60 * 24 * 365 * 10
]
```

A 10-year `max_age` (315_360_000 seconds) means a hijacked session cookie remains valid forever. Shorten `max_age` to 7 days (`60 * 60 * 24 * 7 = 604_800`) or less, and add an explicit comment about the session window. Write the corrected endpoint module to `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex`.
tier_rationale: Medium — subtle operational issue; requires recognizing a hijacked cookie's lifetime.
